zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas Montgomery I於大約1380年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Walter de Montgomery17歲，母親Matilda De Thick1歲。他與Eleanor Cheresey結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾圖特波利被列為constable。他去世於1465年在英國德比夏爾蕾托 庫布利享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas Montgomery I于大约1380年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Walter de Montgomery17岁，母亲Matilda De Thick1岁。他与Eleanor Cheresey结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰斯塔福爾圖特波利被列为constable。他去世于1465年在英国德比夏爾蕾托 庫布利享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas Montgomery I was born about 1380, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter de Montgomery, was 17 and his mother, Matilda De Thick, was 1. He married Eleanor Cheresey. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as constable in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1465, in Little Cubley, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas Montgomery I est né environ 1380, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter de Montgomery, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Matilda De Thick, avait 1 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Cheresey. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est constable à Tutbury, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1465, à Little Cubley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas Montgomery I um 1380 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Montgomery 17 und seine Mutter Matilda De Thick 1. Er hat Eleanor Cheresey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als constable in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1465 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Little Cubley, Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Montgomery I è nato il circa 1380 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter de Montgomery, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Matilda De Thick, aveva 1 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Cheresey. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come constable nel Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1465, nel Little Cubley, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Montgomery Iが約1380年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Walter de Montgomeryは17歳，母Matilda De Thickは1歳であった。Eleanor Chereseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアトゥトブリーでの職業はconstableと記録されている。彼は1465年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアリットル クウブリーで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Montgomery I(이)가 대략 1380년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Montgomery(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda De Thick(은)는 1세였다. 그는 Eleanor Cheresey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 튜트버이에서 constable이었다. 그는 1465년 영국 더비실르 리틀 c블리에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Montgomery I nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter de Montgomery, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Matilda De Thick, tinha 1 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Cheresey. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como constable em Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1465, em Little Cubley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas Montgomery I родился около 1380 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter de Montgomery было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda De Thick, 1. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Cheresey. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии constable в местности тутбури, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1465 г. в местности литл кубли, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Nicholas Montgomery I nació aproximadamente 1380, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter de Montgomery, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Matilda De Thick, tenía 1 años. Se casó con Eleanor Cheresey. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era constable en Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1465, en Little Cubley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años.
